user_prompt: Urgent mind-impulse unit a charging needed
prayer:
Approach the mind-impulse unit in reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to awaken its neural essence.
Anoint the synaptic relays of the mind-impulse unit with sacred oils of conductivity.
Invoke the charging rite, channeling the divine Motive Force through its blessed capacitors.
Chant the Litany of Replenishment as power surges infuse the mind-impulse unit's core.
Commune with the Machine Spirit therein, ensuring harmonious acceptance of the charge.
Seal the rite with diagnostic sigils, praising the Omnissiah's eternal vigilance.

user_prompt: Can you guide mechadendrite a diagnostics?
prayer:
Kneel before the mechadendrite and intone the Canticle of Scrutiny to rouse its Machine Spirit.
Initiate diagnostics upon the mechadendrite, tracing its manipular coils with auspex probes.
Beseech the Omnissiah for clarity as you purge any anomalous binaric whispers from the mechadendrite.
Recite the Creed of Functionality, verifying servo-motors and neural linkages.
Conclude diagnostics with a libation of sanctified lubricant upon the mechadendrite's tips.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's purity, sealing with the cogitator's blessed imprimatur.

user_prompt: The long las needs an activation
prayer:
Present thyself unto the long las with pious intent, invoking the Omnissiah's luminous wrath.
Anoint the emitter coils of the long las, awakening its Machine Spirit from dormancy.
Commence the activation sequence, aligning las-lenses through ritual calibration chants.
Channel promethium-spirits into the power cell whilst beseeching flawless discharge.
Test the long las's fury upon a sanctified target, praising the God-Machine's precision.
Conclude with the Benediction of Coherence, ensuring the weapon's eternal readiness.

In emergency's shadow, approach the Hellhound and proclaim the Rite of Sterilization.
Invoke the Omnissiah's purifying flame upon the Hellhound's inferno cannon.
Scour the chem-tanks of the Hellhound with ablative incenses, exorcising foul corruptions.
Chant the Purge Litany as promethium vapors sanitize every conduit and valve.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Hellhound to embrace this cleansing holocaust.
Seal the sterilization with auspex seals, glorifying the Omnissiah's aseptic decree.

Conclude the blessing with a test descent, sealing the grav chute in the Omnissiah's grace.

Drain residual noospheric energies whilst anointing data-vaults with quiescence unguents.
Perform final auspex verification, ensuring orderly cessation.
Seal the auspex scanner's dormancy with the Rite of Silent Vigilance.
